name: skillio-lms
description: Monorepo for the Skillio LMS frontend and backend.

scripts.db:dotnet:migrate: dotnet tool run dotnet-ef database update --project backend-dotnet/LMS.Api.csproj --startup-project backend-dotnet/LMS.Api.csproj
scripts.db:dotnet:migration:add: dotnet tool run dotnet-ef migrations add
